name: Caterpillar Inc.
description: Caterpillar Inc. is the world's leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment, off-highway diesel and natural gas engines, industrial gas turbines, and diesel-electric locomotives. For nearly a century, the company has been driving positive change on every continent, helping customers build a better, more sustainable world through innovative products and services. Operating through three primary segments—Construction Industries, Resource Industries, and Energy & Transportation—Caterpillar provides essential machinery and financial services that support global infrastructure development, energy production, and resource extraction.

investment_theses.company_type: Industrial Equipment / Construction for New US Factories
